title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM QS (Questionnaires) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM QS (Questionnaires) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw questionnaires data, (2) Derive USUBJID and QSSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: QSTESTCD, QSTEST, QSORRES, QSSTRESC, QSSTRESN, VISITNUM, (4) Handle questionnaire mapping for ADAS-Cog and MMSE, test scoring, visit alignment, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 30096 records.
